0.Description: Designed and deployed production ML systems for Fortune 500 clients including [Adobe], [Fannie Mae], [Warner Bros Games], [Angel Studios], [The Cigna Group], and [NuSkin] — architecting AI/ML pipelines on [AWS]. • Built Sushi [RAG] App: production [LangChain] pipeline with tool orchestration, structured memory, and chain-of-thought reasoning; benchmarked [Claude], [OpenAI], [Mistral], and [Llama] on retrieval quality, latency, and task accuracy to select the optimal production configuration. • Developed campaign asset automation pipeline integrating [DALL-E 3] for programmatic social media ad generation, with prompt engineering, brand compliance validation, and quality controls to ensure consistent creative output at scale. • Built Color Palette Maker: [React 19]/[Python] app using 5-strategy [OpenCV] region detection, region-masked [K-means] clustering, and [CIEDE2000] perceptual color matching. [Dockerized] with full [CI/CD] and a [Kubernetes] migration path. • Developed "Flock of Postcards": data-driven [JavaScript] visualization featuring 3D motion parallax and depth-of-field effects; 310 commits across 11 iterative versions. • [AWS Glue] and [PySpark] for data cleansing, lineage tracking, and governance; [GitHub Actions] for automated [CI/CD] pipelines.

1.Description: Refactored legacy [Python]/[Django] [REST APIs] and developed new endpoints backed by [PostgreSQL] on [AWS Aurora], reducing technical debt and improving maintainability. • Built admin tooling to streamline [SEO] platform workflows, supported by comprehensive [PyTest] coverage to ensure reliability.

2.Description: Designed and deployed a production [CNN]-based video classification system using [PyTorch] on [AWS SageMaker] for automated frame-level content tagging, enabling a new advertising revenue stream through fine-grained categorization. • Conducted model selection and feature analysis using [Jupyter], [Pandas], [NumPy], [Scikit-Learn], and [Keras]; produced [QuickSight] and [Plotly] dashboards to communicate findings to technical and non-technical stakeholders. • Created [RESTful APIs] for data exchange with external e-commerce and advertising partners, supporting downstream monetization of classified content.

3.employer: Fannie Mae / Risk Works Analysis Data Lake
3.Description: Built [dbt]-validated [SQL] pipelines for data cleansing and lake ingestion using [AWS Redshift], [Glue], [Airflow], [S3], and [Lambda] across a multi-source mortgage risk data lake. • Tracked schema evolution with [Amazon Glue] across a multi-source data lake; built custom [Redshift] views that reduced ad-hoc analyst query time and standardized reporting across risk teams.

4.Description: Architected migration from static credential management to runtime [CyberArk PAM] integration with mutual [TLS] [mTLS]; eliminated hardcoded secrets, enabled automated rotation, reduced costs by 95%. • Modernized [Jenkins] [CI/CD] pipeline with [SetupTools], [Artifactory]/[PyPI], [SonarQube], and [Xray]; built [Terraform]-based application templates.

5.Description: Integrated [Segment CDP] with in-game telemetry, purchase history, and [Salesforce] to unify player profiles across the WB Games network; built segmented audiences for [Google Ads], [YouTube], and advertising partners. • Built [Python] integrations connecting [Google BigQuery], [AWS] services, [Salesforce], and [Snowflake] via [REST APIs] and direct connectors — enabling unified cross-platform reporting across the WB Games network.

6.Description: Designed [AWS] healthcare data pipeline: [API Gateway] → [Kinesis] → [S3] [Parquet] → [PySpark] on [EMR] → [Redshift]; new functionality improved patient quality of service by 75% by eliminating fraudulent visit reporting by home-visiting nurses, while maintaining [HIPAA], [GDPR], and PII/PHI compliance.

7.Description: Built [NLP]-based recommendation platform applying vectorization, eigenvector decomposition, and [K-means] [Bayesian] clustering for collaborative filtering — work that led directly to three co-authored patents in vector embedding-based recommendation systems. • Co-authored three patents for [NLP]-based recommendation systems using vector embeddings and cosine similarity.

8.Description: Founded boutique consulting firm; clients included Coca-Cola Corp. Europe, AMI, Medical Services Corp., and Intrusic Cyber Security. • At Intrusic Corp: architected a double-buffered [C++]/[OpenBSD] system for real-time analysis of live [UDP]/[TCP] packet streams, feeding a network intrusion detection system — directly contributing to securing government cybersecurity contracts.
